verses.text: Benjamin' suante aw, na suahtakna dingun tai un. Jerusalem khua taisan un. Tekoa khua-ah peengkul tum un la, Bethlehem khua-ah theihsakna meikhu khusak un. Bang hang hiam cih leh leilu lam panin gimna leh siatna lianpi a hong pai ding hi
A melhoih, a ngek dikdek Zion tanu ka susia ding hi
Kumpite, a galkapte uh tawh ama kiang hong tung ding uh a, a kimkotah giahphual satin a deih peuhpeuh uh a la ding uh hi
Amaute in, “Jerusalem khua a sim dingin kisa un. Tho un, sun ciangin i sim ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi. Ahih hangin amau mah in, “Citciat aw, zekai lua hang! Ni tum dektakta a, i liimte sau keei ta hi
Kithawi un, zan ciangin i sim ding a, a kumpi innte uh i susia ding hi,” a ci ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa in, “A singte phuksak un la, Jerusalem khua simna dingin phungin ciang un. Hih khuapi gim piak kul hi; bang hang hiam cih leh kinetniamna bekbek tawh a kidim hi
Tuikhuk panin tuiphul a tawlngakloh bangin, Jerusalem khua panin siatna tawlngalo hi. Khuasungah ngongtatna leh suksiatna ka za ngitnget a, cinatna leh liamna bekbek ka mu hi
Jerusalem khuapi aw, kidawm in. Na kidop kei leh nang kong taisan ding a, kuama ten'lohna gam simtham na suakkha ding hi,” a ci hi
Vanglian Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Leenggah lo-ah a sangte a kilawh khit bangin Israel mi a omlai sunteng lo siang vet in,” hong ci hi
Keimah in ka dawng kik a, “Amaute in a zak theih dingun kua kiangah va gen ding ka hi hiam? En in, a bil uh bing a, khua za theilo uh hi. Topa' thu simmawh uh a, lungdamna-in lalo uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Topa aw, kei zong ka heh mahmah a, ka thuakzo nawn kei hi,” ka ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a, “Kei' tangdinga na hehna kongzing laka naupangte tungah buakhia in la, tangvalte' kikhopna-ah zong buakhia in. Papite leh nupite zong kilakhia ding a, piteek puteekte zong kipai khiatpih ding hi
A innte uh midangte in luah ding uh a, a lote leh a zite uh a taan ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in kong cihin-ah, hih mite' langkhatah ka khut zanin gim ka pia ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh a neupen pan a lianpen dongin, thumanlopi tawh sum zongin a huaiham uh hi. Kamsangte-a kipan siampite dongin thumanlo khin uh hi
Amaute in ka mite' thuaknate thupi simsak lo uh a, hoihna om keei lopi, ‘Hoih hi, hoih hi,’ ci mawkmawk uh hi

Hih a kihhuai nate a sep uh ciangin a maizum beek uh hiam? Maizum beeklo uh a, kisuangthei beeklo uh hi. Tua ahih manin a site' lak mahah amaute zong si ding uh a, gim ka piak ni ciangin a kilawnkhia ding uh hi,” Topa in hong ci hi

Topa in mite tungah, “Lamkabomah ding un la khuadak un. Lam hoih ahi lampi luite dong un la tawn un. Tua hi leh na tawldam ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in, “Ka tawn kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Topa in, “Peengkul tumna awging a ngai dingin ‘Galvil ding mi ka koih hi,’ kong ci hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amaute in, “Ka ngai kei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin Topa in, “Gamdangte aw, ngai un. Mite aw, amau' tungah bang tung ding hiam cih thei un
Leitung aw, ngai in! En un, hih mite tungah a thuak ding mahun a kilawm siatna ka tungsak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka thu hong ngailo uh a, ka thukhamte a nial uh hi
Bang deihna tawh Sheba gam panin paknamtuite hong pai a, gamlapi panin sing namtuite hong tung ahi hiam? Na meihal biaknate uh ka sang thei kei a, nong biaknate uh deihhuai ka sa kei hi
Tua ahih manin Topa in kong cihin-ah: En un, hih mite a pukna dingin a mai uhah suangtum ka koih ding a, pate leh tate, inn vengte leh lawmte pukin a si ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Topa in, “En un, leilu lam gam panin mi hong pai uh a, leimong gamla pen panin galsim dingin gam lian khat hong kithawithawi hi

Thal leh teipi tawi uh a, gilo mahmah uh a, hehpihna lungsim neiloin a husa uh tuipi ging tawh kibang hi. Jerusalem aw, sakol tungah amaute tuangin, nangmah a hong sim dingin a kithawi uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua thu i za a, bangmah i cih thei kei hi. Lungkhamna in hong lencip a, nupi nausuak ding bangin na i sa hi
Gamlakah paikhia kei un la, lampi-ah zong pai dah un. Bang hang hiam cih leh i galte in namsau tawi uh a, i kimkot khempeuh a lauhuai hi
Topa in, “Ka mite' tanu aw, puanhampi silh in la, vut lakah kikhuk in. Tapa khat neihsun a si bangin kap vangvang in. Bang hang hiam cih leh a hong susia dingpa thakhatin hong tung ding hi
Jeremiah aw, ka mite a ze-et dingin nang kong koih hi. Ze-et in la, a om dan uh thei in
A vekpi-un kei hong langpan' tentan uh a, zuauthu a gen kawikawi uh hi. Sumngo leh sik bangin khauh mahmah uh a, a vekpi-un a siat gamtat khin uh hi
Nakpi takin pum a kizap hangin a ekte tui theilo a, luangkhia theilo hi. Pum a kizapzap hangin a mawkna a suak hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh migilote omlai veve hi
Amaute, a kideihlo ngun-ek kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in, ‘Amaute ka deih kei hi,’” hong ci hi.
